title: AZ-900 Mock Exam 1: Cloud Foundations and Core Services
description: A 50-question unofficial mock paper aligned to the AZ-900 skills measured from July 20, 2026. Covers cloud concepts, Azure architecture and services, and management and governance. Includes detailed explanations and official Microsoft Learn references. Original practice content; not official exam questions.

items.prompt: A company buys physical servers before deploying a new application. Which type of expenditure does this purchase represent?
items.explanation: “Capital expenditure (CapEx)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: A development team uses a managed database service. Who remains responsible for classifying the data stored in the database?
items.explanation: “The customer” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: An organization must keep certain workloads in its own datacenter while bursting other workloads into Azure. Which cloud model is this?
items.explanation: “Hybrid cloud” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: An Azure workload is billed according to the resources it consumes each month. Which cloud pricing characteristic does this demonstrate?
items.explanation: “Consumption-based pricing” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: Which TWO characteristics commonly apply to serverless computing?
answers: The cloud provider manages the underlying infrastructure
Charges can be based on actual execution or consumption
options: The cloud provider manages the underlying infrastructure
Charges can be based on actual execution or consumption
The customer must patch every host operating system
A dedicated physical server must be purchased first
items.explanation: “The cloud provider manages the underlying infrastructure” and “Charges can be based on actual execution or consumption” are the required choices because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: A service must remain accessible when one application instance fails. Which cloud benefit is the primary requirement?
items.explanation: “High availability” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud benefits distinguish availability, scalability, elasticity, reliability, predictability, governance, security, and manageability.

references.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

items.prompt: A workload needs to add resources as demand grows but does not need to remove them automatically. Which benefit is required?
items.explanation: “Scalability” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud benefits distinguish availability, scalability, elasticity, reliability, predictability, governance, security, and manageability.

references.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

items.prompt: A company deploys copies of an application across fault-isolated locations. Which cloud benefit is this primarily intended to improve?
items.explanation: “Reliability” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud benefits distinguish availability, scalability, elasticity, reliability, predictability, governance, security, and manageability.

references.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

items.prompt: Standard templates are used so every environment is deployed consistently. Which cloud benefit does this support?
items.explanation: “Manageability” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud benefits distinguish availability, scalability, elasticity, reliability, predictability, governance, security, and manageability.

references.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

items.prompt: A team needs full control of the guest operating system for a legacy application. Which cloud service type is the best fit?
items.explanation: “Infrastructure as a service (IaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: Developers want to deploy web code without maintaining the operating system or web server. Which service type is the best fit?
items.explanation: “Platform as a service (PaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: Users access a provider-managed email application through a browser. Which service type is this?
items.explanation: “Software as a service (SaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: Which service type gives the customer the greatest control over operating systems and networking configuration?
items.explanation: “Infrastructure as a service (IaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: A managed application platform automatically patches its runtime while developers manage their application and data. Which service type is it?
items.explanation: “Platform as a service (PaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: A solution must place resources in a geographic area that contains one or more Azure datacenters. What is this area called?
items.explanation: “An Azure region” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure regions and availability zones describe physical resiliency, while management groups, subscriptions, resource groups, and resources form the governance hierarchy.

items.prompt: Which Azure construct provides physically separate locations within a region, each with independent power, cooling, and networking?
items.explanation: “Availability zones” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure regions and availability zones describe physical resiliency, while management groups, subscriptions, resource groups, and resources form the governance hierarchy.

items.prompt: Several resources share the same lifecycle and should be managed together. Where should they be placed?
options: In one Microsoft Entra tenant only
items.explanation: “In one resource group” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure regions and availability zones describe physical resiliency, while management groups, subscriptions, resource groups, and resources form the governance hierarchy.

items.prompt: Which TWO statements about Azure resource groups are correct?
answers: A resource belongs to one resource group at a time
A resource group can contain resources from different Azure regions
options: A resource belongs to one resource group at a time
A resource group can contain resources from different Azure regions
A resource group can belong to several subscriptions simultaneously
Deleting a resource group never affects its resources
items.explanation: “A resource belongs to one resource group at a time” and “A resource group can contain resources from different Azure regions” are the required choices because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure regions and availability zones describe physical resiliency, while management groups, subscriptions, resource groups, and resources form the governance hierarchy.

items.prompt: A stateless web tier uses identical virtual machines and must automatically add instances as demand grows. Which service is designed for this?
items.explanation: “Azure Virtual Machine Scale Sets” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: Code should execute in response to events without the team managing servers. Which Azure compute service is the best fit?
items.explanation: “Azure Functions” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: A web application needs managed hosting, deployment slots, and built-in scaling. Which service should host it?
items.explanation: “Azure App Service” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: Two virtual networks need private connectivity over the Microsoft backbone. Which feature should be configured?
items.explanation: “Virtual network peering” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: An on-premises network needs encrypted connectivity to Azure over the public internet. Which service should be used?
items.explanation: “Azure VPN Gateway” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: An application needs to store images and video as unstructured objects. Which Azure Storage service should it use?
items.explanation: “Azure Blob Storage” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: Windows and Linux systems need a managed shared file system accessed with SMB. Which service should be used?
items.explanation: “Azure Files” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: Application components need asynchronous message delivery through a simple backlog. Which storage service is designed for this?
items.explanation: “Azure Queue Storage” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: Data must remain available if a datacenter in one region becomes unavailable, but replication to another region is not required. Which redundancy option fits?
items.explanation: “Zone-redundant storage (ZRS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: Frequently accessed objects require the lowest access cost. Which blob access tier is most appropriate?
items.explanation: “Hot tier” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: Which service provides cloud-based identity and access management for Azure and Microsoft 365?
items.explanation: “Microsoft Entra ID” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: Users should sign in once and access several authorized applications without signing in again. Which feature is required?
items.explanation: “Single sign-on (SSO)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: A sign-in must require a password and a verification code from a phone. Which capability is being used?
items.explanation: “Multifactor authentication (MFA)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: Permissions to manage virtual machines should be granted according to a user’s job role. Which capability should be used?
items.explanation: “Azure role-based access control (RBAC)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: Which TWO principles are part of a Zero Trust approach?
options: Trust every request from the corporate network
Grant permanent owner access by default
items.explanation: “Verify explicitly” and “Use least-privilege access” are the required choices because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: A solution architect wants to estimate the monthly price of planned Azure resources before deployment. Which tool should be used?
items.explanation: “Azure Pricing Calculator” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure pricing and Cost Management tools estimate, allocate, monitor, and optimize spending; tags add useful business metadata but do not enforce access.

items.prompt: A finance team needs to analyze actual Azure spending by subscription and service. Which capability should it use?
items.explanation: “Microsoft Cost Management” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure pricing and Cost Management tools estimate, allocate, monitor, and optimize spending; tags add useful business metadata but do not enforce access.

items.prompt: Resources must be grouped in cost reports by department. What should be applied to the resources?
items.explanation: “Tags” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure pricing and Cost Management tools estimate, allocate, monitor, and optimize spending; tags add useful business metadata but do not enforce access.

items.prompt: Which factor can change the cost of an otherwise identical Azure virtual machine?
items.answer: The Azure region where it is deployed
options: The Azure region where it is deployed
items.explanation: “The Azure region where it is deployed” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure pricing and Cost Management tools estimate, allocate, monitor, and optimize spending; tags add useful business metadata but do not enforce access.

items.prompt: New resources must be restricted to approved Azure regions. Which service should enforce this requirement?
items.explanation: “Azure Policy” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure Policy evaluates resource compliance, locks prevent accidental changes, and Microsoft Purview supports data governance and discovery.

references.title: Describe Azure governance and compliance tools

items.prompt: A production resource must not be accidentally deleted. Which feature should be applied?
items.explanation: “A delete lock” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure Policy evaluates resource compliance, locks prevent accidental changes, and Microsoft Purview supports data governance and discovery.

references.title: Describe Azure governance and compliance tools

items.prompt: A company needs unified data discovery, classification, and governance across its data estate. Which service should it use?
items.explanation: “Microsoft Purview” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure Policy evaluates resource compliance, locks prevent accidental changes, and Microsoft Purview supports data governance and discovery.

references.title: Describe Azure governance and compliance tools

items.prompt: An audit needs a list of resources that do not meet an assigned standard. Which Azure Policy capability provides this?
items.explanation: “Compliance evaluation” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure Policy evaluates resource compliance, locks prevent accidental changes, and Microsoft Purview supports data governance and discovery.

references.title: Describe Azure governance and compliance tools

items.prompt: An administrator wants a browser-based graphical interface to create and manage Azure resources. Which tool should be used?
items.explanation: “The Azure portal” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: An administrator needs an authenticated shell in the browser with Azure CLI and Azure PowerShell available. Which service should be opened?
items.explanation: “Azure Cloud Shell” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: A team wants declarative, repeatable Azure deployments stored in source control. Which approach should it use?
items.explanation: “Infrastructure as code (IaC)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: Which Azure control plane receives requests from the portal, CLI, PowerShell, and APIs?
items.explanation: “Azure Resource Manager” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: Which TWO benefits are associated with ARM templates?
answers: Consistent deployment of multiple related resources
options: Consistent deployment of multiple related resources
Automatic replacement of every application with SaaS
Permanent prevention of all configuration changes
items.explanation: “Repeatable declarative deployments” and “Consistent deployment of multiple related resources” are the required choices because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: An administrator wants personalized recommendations to improve cost, security, reliability, and performance. Which service should be used?
items.explanation: “Azure Advisor” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Advisor recommends improvements, Service Health reports Azure service impact, and Azure Monitor collects and acts on platform and application telemetry.

items.prompt: A team needs information about an Azure outage that affects its resources. Which service should it check?
items.explanation: “Azure Service Health” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Advisor recommends improvements, Service Health reports Azure service impact, and Azure Monitor collects and acts on platform and application telemetry.

items.prompt: Metrics and logs from Azure resources need to be collected and analyzed centrally. Which service provides this platform?
items.explanation: “Azure Monitor” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Advisor recommends improvements, Service Health reports Azure service impact, and Azure Monitor collects and acts on platform and application telemetry.

items.prompt: Application developers need request rates, dependencies, exceptions, and performance telemetry. Which feature should they use?
items.explanation: “Application Insights” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Advisor recommends improvements, Service Health reports Azure service impact, and Azure Monitor collects and acts on platform and application telemetry.
